title: Immunofluorescence for pSer129 alpha-synuclein and total alpha-synuclein in mouse brain

steps: Pre-warm sodium citrate buffer to 37 °C .
Place sections in netwell inserts (Fisher Scientific 07-200-213) in 6-well plate.
Wash 3X in cold 1X TBS for 5 min each with shaking (around 2 mL per well).
Incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 in pre-heated sodium citrate buffer (about 2 mL/well).

Block for 01:00:00 at 4 °C on shaker. Two mL of blocking buffer per well. Make sure sections are not folded on themselves. A B C 1 Blocking buffer 10mL Block (for example) 2 3 5% Normal Goat Serum → 500µL Normal Goat Serum 4 0.1% Triton-X-100 → 100µL 10% Triton-X 5 1X TBS → 9.4mL 1X TBS

Place in primary antibody solution Overnight at 4 °C , shaking. For sections that cover an entire mouse forebbrain with 40 µm sections spaced 240 µm apart we use 2 mL per well. If you are just using a couple sections, you can use 0.5 mL per well in a new 24 well plate. Make sure sections are not folded on themselves. Primary antibodies are diluted in 1X TBS and 5% goat serum ** NO MESH WELLS ** **USE NEW PLATES FOR INCUBATION** Note catalog number and lot number (if available) in your notebook For pS129-α-synuclein (Abcam, ab51253) dilute 1:5000. Note that more concentrated antibody results in higher nonspecific background. It is possible to use at a more dilute concentration, but would need to be determined by user. For α+β synuclein (Abcam, ab51252) dilute 1:2500 Can combine with other primary antibodies that were not generated in rabbit.
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 (1/3).
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 (2/3).
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 (3/3).
Wash 3X in 1X TBS for 5 min each.
Wash in 1X TBS for 00:05:00 (1/3).
Wash in 1X TBS for 00:05:00 (2/3).
Wash in 1X TBS for 00:05:00 (3/3).
Wash 3X in cold 1X TBS for 5 min each with shaking.
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 with shaking (1/3).
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 with shaking (2/3).
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 with shaking (3/3).

Place in secondary antibodies for 02:00:00 at 4 °C , shaking. Cover plate with foil to protect from light. Secondary antibodies are diluted in 1X TBS and 5% goat serum ** NO MESH WELLS for incubation** Use goat anti-rabbit Alexa 488 1:500 (Thermofisher A-11034) Hoechst 33342 (Thermofisher H1399) also diluted 1:500
Wash 3X in 1X cold TBS for 5min each with shaking.
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 with shaking (1/3).
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 with shaking (2/3).
Wash in cold 1X TBS for 00:05:00 with shaking (3/3).

Gently mount onto Superfrost plus slides in 1X TBS with a couple drops of 10% Tx-100. Try your best not to rip sections or allow sections to fold. If you have sections representing entire brain, mount in order from rostral to caudal. Make sure the coverslip will cover all the sections. If you don’t think it will cover the sections, use another slide. It’s better to mount fewer sections and make sure the coverslip will cover them.
Allow to dry, coverslip using ProlongGold. Pipette ProlongGold onto each section (about 30-50 µL). Slowly lower coverslip over sections to prevent bubbles.
creator: Laura Volpicelli-Daley
